top_signals.title: Telecom Italia Is Said to Consider €10.8 Billion Poste Bid Fair
top_signals.summary: Telecom Italia SpA’s board is leaning toward endorsing Poste Italiane SpA’s €10.8 billion ($12.4 billion) takeover offer as fair, and is unlikely to seek a higher price, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
